raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Agricultural workers in Monterey County are three times more likely to contract the coronavirus than those in the general population.",
    "Latinos in Monterey County account for 93 percent of COVID-19 cases while only representing 61 percent of the population.",
    "A study from UCLA shows Latino deaths have quintupled since May because of their status as 'unsung essential workers.'",
    "AB 2043 will ensure enforcement by Cal/OSHA of its COVID-19 guidance.",
    "AB 2043 funds a targeted bilingual outreach campaign to educate agricultural workers on Cal/OSHA guidance and COVID-19-related benefits.",
    "AB 2165 expands the availability of electronic filing to all state trial courts to address access issues in rural communities.",
    "The 'Housing for the Harvest' program provides safe, temporary isolation spaces for sick or at-risk agricultural workers.",
    "The California Administration announced in May that it would increase testing availability for rural and underserved communities.",
    "Both testing and PPE access will be improved for agricultural workers due to the actions announced in July.",
    "AB 2164 aimed to expand telehealth services for rural and community health centers."
  ]
}
```
